<?php namespace Spatie\ErrorSolutions\Solutions\Laravel; use Spatie\ErrorSolutions\Contracts\Solution; use Spatie\ErrorSolutions\Solutions\Concerns\IsProvidedByFlare; class SuggestUsingMysql8DatabaseSolution implements Solution { use IsProvidedByFlare; public function getSolutionTitle(): string { return 'Database is not a MySQL 8 database'; } public function getSolutionDescription(): string { return "Laravel 11 changed the default collation for MySQL and MariaDB. It seems you are trying to use the MySQL 8 collation `utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci` with a MariaDB or MySQL 5.7 database.\n\nEdit the `.env` file and use the correct database in the `DB_CONNECTION` key."; } /** @return array<string, string> */ public function getDocumentationLinks(): array { return [ 'Database: Getting Started docs' => 'https://laravel.com/docs/master/database#configuration', ]; } }
